feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Create Product Variant from Sales Order - maintaining additional fields
entry.content:
We try to create a Product Variant from a Sales Order and want to prepopulate specific fields / make certain links, in particular:

  • assign super routing to Product Variant
  • assign super BOM to Product Variant
  • automatic creation of Production Version for the configured Product Variant
  • fill in additional fields of the Product Variant
  • fill in additional fields of Production Version

We identified the BadIs

  • BD_LO_VCHCLF_VCH_SD_VAR_COPY
  • BD_LO_VCHCLF_VCH_SD_VAR_DATA

Unfortunately, we could not manage to accomplish the described functionality with these Badis.

Is this possible in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

How can we handle this during the process “Create Product Variant” as an automated process?

entry.title: Consolidation field from Group Reporting is unavailable in App: Display Line Items in General Ledger
entry.content:
In Private Cloud, The T-Code: FAGLL03H has consolidation fields available to select for layout display. However, In Public Cloud, we expected The App: F2217 - Display Line Items in General Ledger which contains all fields from ACDOCA should also has consolidation fields available to be selected but turned out it doesn't.

Please kindly suggest the other available report app which can display group reporting data in FI Line item report.

Example of required fields to be display:

  • Consolidation Unit
  • Company
  • Consolidation Chart of Account
  • Consolidation financial Statement Item
  • Consolidation subitem category
  • Consolidation subitem

entry.title: YCOA G/L Account Automatic Posting Assignment Documentation for COGS and Inventory Accounts
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,
I'm working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation and need to understand the automatic posting logic for G/L accounts in the standard chart of accounts YCOA, particularly for COGS (Cost of Goods Sold) and inventory-related accounts.
What I'm looking for:

 

Comprehensive documentation or mapping that shows which automatic posting transactions (e.g., GBB - Goods Issue, WRX - Goods Receipt, etc.) are linked to each YCOA G/L account
Specifically for accounts in the 50x/51x/52x/54x/55x/59x ranges (COGS, consumption, variances, inventory changes)

 

Example accounts I need clarification on:

 

50100000 - COGS Raw Mat w/o CE
50150000 - COGS Packmat w/o CE
50200000 - COGS Trade
50300000 - COGS SF&F w/o CE
50301000 - COGS Direct Material
50302000 - COGS Third Party
50303000 - COGS Material Overhd
50304000 - COGS Personnel Time
50305000 - COGS Machine Time
50306000 - COGS Setup Time
50307000 - COGS Productn Overhd
50308000 - COGS Credit Co/By-Pr
50309000 - COGS - Hardware
50309500 - COGS - Licenses
51100000 - Consptn Raw Mat
51500000 - Consptn Packag Mat
51600000 - Consptn Trde Gds
51700000 - Consptn Repair Mat
51900000 - Consptn Subct.w/o CE
51950000 - Consptn Subcontr
52001000 through 52590000 - Various inventory variances, price differences, and adjustments
54011000 through 54444000 - Inventory changes and reserves
55100000, 55110000 - Production order adjustments
59801000, 59900000 - Adjustments and affiliated COGS

 

My specific questions:

 

Is there a consolidated reference document or SAP Help article that maps YCOA accounts to their corresponding automatic posting keys?
For COGS accounts (501xxxxx, 503xxxxx), which specific business transactions trigger postings? (e.g., goods issue for sales order, consumption posting, production order settlement, etc.)
For variance and price difference accounts (520xxxxx, 525xxxxx), what are the exact conditions that cause automatic postings?
Are there any Best Practice configuration guides that explain the intended use case for each account in YCOA?

 

I've reviewed the standard SAP Help Portal documentation for Financial Accounting but couldn't find a comprehensive mapping. Any guidance, links to official documentation, or practical insights from implementation experience would be greatly appreciated.
System details:

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
Chart of Accounts: YCOA
Focus area: Financial Accounting (FI), Material Ledger integration

 

Thank you in advance for your help!
Best regards,

entry.title: Customer Down payment work flow
entry.content:
Hi  team 

my client need customer down payment request workflow approval process, kindly let us know it available or not in our system.it emergency 

regards

 v b mohan krishna

entry.title: When awarding the supplier quotation to PO, the interface displays the "Manage Purchase Orders".
entry.content:
When awarding the supplier quotation to PO, the interface has the manage purchase orders view. I need to maintain PO header conditions therefore i need to know how i can open the po creation from advanced mode?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Retrieve value from QR code via RF in EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Our pallet labels are placed from our vendors under a common format. There are several information that we would like to be able to retrieve in the RF transactions in our embedded warehouse management system. For the handling unit identification we are storing the box id on field External identification 2 of the handling units. We would like to be able to scan the QR code of the label and retrieve only the part that corresponds the the Box no and search for the handling unit number based on the external identification 2 value.

Is there an enhancement in RF transactions that provides this functionality?

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

Go to RF menu SAP . Select any RF transaction with HU (like create and confirm adhoc HU WT) and scan QR code with multiple information. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific
entry.content: We are using "Make Company Code Settings - Asset Accounting-Specific " for adding FY2026 in to the SAP. But it is asking to close FY2024 depreciation posting to add the new year. Asset depreciation has been maintained manually. we do not want to post in SAP. how to resolve this and add FY 2026 to the system?

entry.title: Missing Sales Order & WBS Fields in Manage Customer Line Items App (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
In the Manage Customer Line Items app, we have observed that order-related information (highlighted in yellow) is not currently available.

Could you please advise whether it is possible to enhance or extend this report to include fields such as Sales Order Number and WBS Element for each journal entry?

entry.title: Inconsistent Billed Revenue Display Across Event-Based Revenue Recognition Apps
entry.content:
In a SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system, we are observing inconsistencies in how billed revenue is displayed across different apps for customer projects.

Please find the observations and expectations below:

1. App: Event-Based Revenue Recognition – Projects

  • Available:
    The app displays:
    • Billed Revenue
    • Sales Deduction/Surcharge
  • Missing:
    A field showing the net invoiced amount (i.e., Billed Revenue adjusted by Sales Deduction/Surcharge)
  • Expectation:
    The net amount (after deductions/surcharges) would be the most relevant figure, as it reflects the actual invoiced value considered for revenue adjustment.

2. Period View (same app)

  • Observation:
    Only the total billed revenue is visible.
    Sales deductions/surcharges are not shown, nor is the adjusted (net) invoiced amount.

3. App: Revenue Recognition – Event-Based Projects

  • Same observation as point 1:
    Missing visibility of the net invoiced amount derived from billed revenue and deductions.

4. App: Project Profitability

  • Available:
    Only Billed Revenue is displayed
  • Missing:
    • Sales Deduction/Surcharge
    • Net invoiced amount (after adjustments)

5. App: Sales Volume – Flexible Analysis

  • Observation:
    This app displays the actual invoiced amount along with corresponding invoice references.
  • Note:
    This highlights the gap, as the invoiced (net) value is visible here but not consistently reflected in the other apps mentioned above.

Question

Is this standard system behavior in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, or is there a recommended way (e.g., configuration, CDS view extension, or custom analytics) to consistently display the missing information across these apps?

entry.title: Offsetting based on Segments or profit centers in SAP GR
entry.content:
Dear expert,

Does the SAP GR public cloud version and private cloud version support offsetting based on Segments or profit centers?

Is it the case that only the private cloud version can support Segment or profit center offsets in the same way as the optimise deployment version?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Practice System is full right now, but no worries... spots will open soon. Keep trying!
entry.content:
Hi

While trying to access Hands-on Practice for Intermediate ABAP Programming(S4D401) and Hands-on Practice for Data Modelling in ABAP Dictionary and ABAP Core Data Services(S4D430), I am getting the below error message

Temporarily unavailable

The Practice System is full right now, but no worries... spots will open soon. Keep trying!

Kindly let me know how long it will take for sap to provide access systems as I have to finish the modules for certification purpose.

entry.title: Mass Option to delete "In Preparation" Output Items in Purchase Order
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud, is there any mass option to delete Output items in Purchase Order?

We are migrating older P.O into Ariba Network with CA automation. To achieve this, i need to trigger EDI output.
But the purchase orders contains output line for email which in "In Preparation Stage". This is due to wrong email address in OPD, the system is unable to fetch valid data so that the output changes to completed.

Due to this, new output lines are not being generated from changing any field that is relevant to print, because system is still expecting the previous line output data to be fixed.
When manually proving the correct email for the "In preparation" output item, it is then getting processed to completed, only after any changes to the P.O are generating new output lines.

So i have 2500+ that needs to be triggered with EDI. Is there any mass option to delete the "In Preparation" output line so i can trigger new Output Lines?

I have already tried Mass changes, Manage Output Items but these are still not working as the data is still "In Preparation" and system cannot overwrite it unless it is manually fixed.

entry.title: RAP Translation Issue – XLF Maintained but Labels Not Reflecting in SAP Public cloud UI
entry.content:
RAP Translation Issue in S/4HANA Public Cloud – XLF Not Reflecting

Hi Experts,

I’m facing an issue with translations in a managed RAP application (S/4HANA Public Cloud).

What I did

  • Maintained translations via XLF file for Metadata Extension/CDS labels using the Maintain Translations app (Development tenant)

  • Uploaded and activated successfully

  • Logged in with the target language

❗ Issue

Translations are not reflecting in the UI (still showing source/English language)

  • Labels are defined using @EndUserText.label

  • Fields are exposed via UI annotations

Additional Info

  • Attaching:

    • Screenshot of metadata translation (XLF)

    • Maintain Translations app by uploading the XIF and Publishing the same.

    • Logon language showing target language but no translation in UI

Question

Are there any specific limitations or additional steps in RAP (Public Cloud) for translations to work, or is there any additional actions required?

Any suggestion or best practices would be really helpful.

Thanks you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Research and Development SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Credit Note & Debit Note all amount still show positive in standard CDS view
entry.content:
We are using the standard CDS View I_BillingDocPrcgElmntBasic in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. In this standard CDS view, all amount fields (including pricing elements and quantity-related amounts) are displayed as positive values, regardless of the billing document type - G2, CBRE, L2.

However, from a business perspective: Credit Notes (returns) should reflect negative values and Debit Notes should reflect positive values.

Currently, the system does not differentiate the sign based on billing document type, and there is no standard field or configuration available to derive the correct sign.

We would like to clarify if

Is there any standard logic, field, or CDS view available that provides signed values for billing document pricing elements?

If not, is there a recommended approach from SAP to derive the correct sign (e.g., based on billing document type or pricing condition)?

entry.title: ZERO base price requirement in sales order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

I have designed internal repair process where orders are created from sales force quotation and converted into SO. But as per our business there are repair products which are created as non stock NLAG but these are actual meant for text items.
Now out business needs these itesm to be just for text represent in sales order and dont carry price but fact is PPR0 base price is mandatory in sales order type "OR".

I have tried alternate solution based on item category determination of TATX but to for this need to leave blank item category group in customer master sales data which is not possible because the item category group is mandatory.
So how feasible to get ZERO pricing for such kind of products?
which material type to be used?
Are there any other method in S4 hana public cloud to make ZERO condition records acceptance in sales order.
Example order 1413 with product/material : Repair Damage broken (5582199031)
Because of system don't accept ZERO pricing , we

entry.title: add new tax classification sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

i want to ask is it possible to create a new tax classification in sap public cloud ? if we can create a new one, where to maintain it ? is it in img or cbc ? I already check it its already maintain code for government but is it possible to create a new one tax classification code ?

 

Thankyou

entry.title: How to increase the length of the ODN in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
entry.content:
Hi Team,
is it possible to increase the length of ODN number in SAP Public Cloud

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue with Location-Level Restriction Not Working
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are currently working on implementing restrictions at the storage location level. Our requirement is that once a specific location is restricted, users should not be able to create any entries for that location.

We have already applied restrictions at the user role level; however, the restriction is not working as expected. The user is still able to make entries for the restricted location in MIGO.

Could you please assist us in understanding how we can properly restrict users at the location level to prevent such entries?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

entry.title: How to Get a View of Supplier Payments and Customer Collections in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working with a customer in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud who needs a way to obtain a weekly forecast of incoming and outgoing payments, and ideally view everything within a single application. Specifically, they are looking for a tool or report that allows them to:

  • See which supplier invoices need to be paid in the following week and in the weeks after.

  • See which customer invoices are expected to be collected during those same weeks.

The purpose is to help them better plan their cash requirements.

The customer needs a forward-looking view based on the due dates of open items, but organized by future weeks (week +1, week +2, week +3, etc.).

I have reviewed the standard apps for supplier and customer open items, as well as cash flow apps, but I have not found any functionality that presents this information together in a single application.

Is there any standard app, report, or functionality in Public Cloud that provides this weekly forecast of payments and collections?

Any guidance or experience you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Custom Workflow for Purchase Requisition Based on Header Custom Field in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have added custom fields in the workflow  of Purchase Requisition conditions and the same custom fields are also available at the header level of the Purchase Requisition. My requirement is to trigger a custom workflow in the Create Purchase Requisition – Advanced App  based on the values of those custom fields.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition #2602 @ALL
